findings.description: Repeated header/footer content inserted between page-equivalent sections disrupts reading order. The officials' names and titles (PAT McCRORY/Governor, DONALD R. VAN DER VAART/Secretary, TRACY DAVIS/Director) and the 'State of North Carolina | Environmental Quality...' footer text appear as interstitial blocks between the main memorandum sections throughout the HTML.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, page 1 has the letterhead with officials at top and footer at bottom, with the MEMORANDUM content in between. In the HTML, after the letterhead image area and a blank section, the footer text appears, then a color bar, then the officials are repeated as text, and only then does the MEMORANDUM heading and content appear. This pattern of interstitial footer/header blocks repeats between subsequent page-equivalent sections.

findings.description: Governor's surname capitalization altered from the PDF's rendering.
findings.evidence: PDF shows "PAT McCRORY" (all capitals). HTML renders it as "PAT McCrORY" with a lowercase 'r', which matches neither the PDF's all-caps presentation nor the standard spelling "McCrory".
